zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean I de PARTHENAY於從1270年到1285年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼時，他的父親Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY35歲，母親Jeanne de MONFORT36歲。他於大約1285年與Marguerite De Meslay在法國崔洛易-吉黑梅斯萊結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年5月1日，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯o武易利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean I de PARTHENAY于从1270年到1285年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼时，他的父亲Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY35岁，母亲Jeanne de MONFORT36岁。他于大约1285年与Marguerite De Meslay在法国崔洛易-吉黑梅斯萊结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年5月1日，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯o武易利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean I de PARTHENAY was born from 1270 to 1285, in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY, was 35 and his mother, Jeanne de MONFORT, was 36. He married Marguerite De Meslay about 1285, in Meslay, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 1 May 1358, and was buried in Ouilly, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean I de PARTHENAY est né du 1270 au 1285, à Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de MONFORT, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite De Meslay environ 1285, à Meslay, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1358, et a été enterré à Ouilly, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean I de PARTHENAY von 1270 bis 1285 in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY 35 und seine Mutter Jeanne de MONFORT 36. Er hat um 1285 in Meslay, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich Marguerite De Meslay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Mai 1358 und wurde in Ouilly, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I de PARTHENAY è nato il da 1270 a 1285 nel Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de MONFORT, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite De Meslay circa 1285, nel Meslay, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 1 maggio 1358, e fu sepolto a Ouilly, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean I de PARTHENAYがから1270年まで1285年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインデウクス-スevレスパースエナイで生まれた時，父Guillaume VI de PARTHENAYは35歳，母Jeanne de MONFORTは36歳であった。約1285年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーメスレイでMarguerite De Meslayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年5月1日に死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスルhoンオウイリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean I de PARTHENAY(이)가 1270년 부터 1285년 까지 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 데우스-스e브레스 파르테나이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de MONFORT(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1285년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 메슬레이에서 Marguerite De Meslay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 5월 1일 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 우이리에 묻혔다.

lv.BET 1270 AND 1285–1 MAY 1358: no 1270. gada līdz 1285. gadam–1358. gada 1. maijs

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I de PARTHENAY nasceu de 1270 a 1285, em Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de MONFORT, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite De Meslay aproximadamente 1285, em Meslay, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1358, e foi sepultado em Ouilly, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean I de PARTHENAY родился с 1270 по 1285 в местности партенеи, деукс-сeвресь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de MONFORT, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite De Meslay около 1285 г. в местности меслеи, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 1 мая 1358 г. и был похоронен в местности оуилли, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

sm.BET 1270 AND 1285–1 MAY 1358: mai le 1270 e o'o I le 1285–1 Me 1358
sm.BET 1270 AND 1285: mai le 1270 e o'o I le 1285

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean I de PARTHENAY nació desde 1270 hasta 1285, en Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Jeanne de MONFORT, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Marguerite De Meslay aproximadamente 1285, en Meslay, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1358, y fue sepultado en Ouilly, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
